tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen module

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.animals_in_pen() → dict[int, Animal]
tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.pen() → Pen
tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_pen_init(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the initialization of Pen class.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_current_stocking_density(pen: Pen, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the calculation of current stocking density.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_is_populated(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], expected: bool) → None

Tests the pen’s population status.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_needs_ration_formulation(ration: dict[int, float], is_populated: bool, expected: bool, pen: Pen, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests if the pen needs a ration formulated.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_animal_types_in_pen(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the set of animal types currently in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_number_of_lactating_cows_in_pen(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the number of lactating cows.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_cows_in_pen(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the numbers of all cows in pen

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_growth(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the calculation of average animal growth.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_growth_empty_pen(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the calculation of average animal growth when there are no animals in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_total_manure_excretion(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the aggregation of manure excretion.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_animal_requirements(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the average nutritional requirements for all animals in a pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_animal_requirements_no_animals(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the average nutritional requirements whe no animals in pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_nutrition_supply(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the average nutritional supplies for all animals in a pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_nutrition_supply_no_animals(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the average nutritional supplies whe no animals in pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_phosphorus_requirements(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the average phosphorus requirements for all animals in pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_phosphorus_requirements_no_animals(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the average phosphorus requirements whe no animals in pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_body_weight(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the calculated average body weight of animals in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_body_weight_empty_pen(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the calculated average body weight of animals when there are no animals in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_average_body_weight_no_animals(pen: Pen) → None

Tests the case when there’s no animal.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_milk_production(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the calculation of average milk production.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_milk_production_non_LAC(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the calculation of average milk production when animal combination is not lac cow.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_milk_production_no_cows(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the calculation of average milk production when there is no cow in pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_milk_production_reduction(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the calculation of average milk production reduction.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_average_milk_production_reduction_no_cows(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the calculation of average milk production reduction when there is no cow in pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_total_enteric_methane(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the calculation of total enteric methane.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_reduce_milk_production(reduce_milk_production_result: list[bool], expected_output: bool, pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the execution of milk production reduction.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_remove_animals_by_ids(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], removal_list: list[Any]) → None

Tests the removal of animals by id.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_update_animals(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test animal update routines.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_add_new_animals(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the function to adda list of animals into the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_insert_animals_into_animals_in_pen_map(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests adding a list of new animals in the animals_in_pen map.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_insert_animal_into_animals_in_pen_map(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], is_cow: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests adding an animal in the animals_in_pen map.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_update_animal_combination(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the update of pen’s animal combination

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_update_daily_walking_distance(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], animal_types_in_pen: set[AnimalType], is_cow: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the update of daily walking distance for cows in pen

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_clear(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the pen animal clearing method.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_get_manure_data(mocker: MockerFixture, pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal]) → None

Tests the getter for manure data, including manure streams.

Tests get_manure_streams() with both custom and fallback logic.

Tests the getter for the requested feed.

Tests setting the nutritional requirements for all animals in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_set_animal_nutritional_supply(pen: Pen, animals_in_pen: dict[int, Animal], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests setting the nutritional supplies for all animals in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_formulate_optimized_ration(pen: Pen, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the calculation of new ration for the pen based on the number of animals in the pen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_pen.test_pen.test_calculate_manure_surface_area(pen: Pen, pen_type: str, has_cows: bool, expected_area: float | None, raises_error: bool) → None

Tests _calculate_manure_surface_area() for various pen types and animal combinations.
